description: Inspired by the cheeky quotes on statement tees, this fastrack watch refuses to conform, with its sassy dial. Minimalist design, classic round face, and a steel strap give it a modern feel backed up by a steel case for optimal performance. Wear this with trendy, casual ensembles - colour-pop tees, denims and sports shoes. Case diameter: 35 mm Case thickness: 6 mm Dial shape: Round Steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Stainless steel strap with tang clasp for comfort and style Red, black and white dial with branding between the 3 and 5 hour marks Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering
